violations.text: Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Container of chili was observed with mold. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Ice disposed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

(Various food product) was observed held at (46-54 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

(Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings throughout kitchen and basement ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The following non food contact equipment was observed in poor repair: 1.Door handle to 1 Dr reach in cooler 2.1 Dr reach in cooler ambient temperatures was observed at 48DF. Equipment must be maintain in good repair and proper adjustment. Establishment not allowed to store TCS foods in unit until repaired or preplaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -all sinks -stove hoods -grill table and shelves -stoves -sandwich presser -prep table shelves -all refrigerator units Non food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Ice disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

(Grilled chicken breast and corned beef), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours.PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

(Cheese) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings throughout the establishment ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The door to the outside, located in the (kitchen), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (co2 tank) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The following non food contact equipment is not in good repair: 1.1 door reach in cooler door handle 2.1 door reach in unit ambient temperatures observed at 44df. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS products in unit until repaired and/or replaced. Equipment must be maintain in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:-dishwasher-dish strainer-all sinks-all refrigerator units-prep table shelves-stove hoods-grill table and shelves-sandwich presser-stovesNon food food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The following physical facilities observed in poor repair:1.walls in the kitchen, back kitchen, and basement observed holes and chipped paint(kitchen). 2.floors in the kitchen observed with broken tiles. 3.ceiling tiles observed with water stain and missing tiles.The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

Establishment is lacking handwashing signage at handwashing sink in mens bathroom. A sign or poster must be available to notify food service employees of handwashing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

Containers of cooked onions was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
Observed ROP fish observed at 42DF with package still intact. PIC informed and voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the back kitchen area , is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The following equipment observed in poor repair: 1.1 dr Refrigerator is has broken door handle. 2.1dr refrigerators located in kitchen observed with ambient temperature of 57DF and 61DF.Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food products in unit until repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces debris: 1.ice machine observed with debris. 2.food storage shelves in basement and kitchen observed with soil and food residue, other debris. 3.all refrigeration units (interior & exterior) has food residue and other debris. 4.stove hoods has an accumulation of grease. 5. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The following physical facilities observed in poor repair: 1.floors in the kitchen has cracked, damage, or missing tiles. 2.ceiling observed with water stains in the kitchen. 3.walls in kitchen and back hallway area observed with holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2024

The walls, floors, doorway, doors, and ceilings in the walk in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen and floors in basement have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen near warewashing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2024
